title: RunManifest
description: Schema for Summit Agent Run Manifests

agent_graph_version.description: Version identifier of the agent graph

tool_versions.description: Map of tool names to their versions

model_parameters.description: Model configuration used for the run

memory_snapshot_hashes.description: Hashes of memory snapshots at start of run

policy_bundle_hash.description: Hash of the policy bundle used

final_state_hash.description: Hash of the final state (e.g. TaskGraph) after run completion
